  • When do I need to use the DC-5V power cable?

    The power cable is only necessary in cases of inadequate power supply or when used with devices providing poor power output. Most models and usage scenarios do not require the power cable.

  • Why is my hard drive read/write speed slow?

    Why is my hard drive read/write speed slow?

    Slow hard drive read/write speeds may vary depending on host devices, interfaces, usage conditions, and other factors. To achieve maximum performance, always use a USB 3.2 Gen 1×1 or later interface.

  • Why is my hard drive's actual capacity different from the advertised capacity?

    Different operating systems calculate hard drive capacity differently than manufacturers. For example:

    Windows systems use binary calculations (1 TB = 1024 GB)

    In Windows systems:

    2 TB ≈ 1862 GB, 1 TB ≈ 931 GB, 750 GB ≈ 698 GB, 500 GB ≈ 465 GB

product.description:
Overview

Accelerate your creative workflow with the 8TB Blackbox PRO RAID Array from Glyph Technologies. Featuring a 10 Gb/s compatible USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 connection, this high-speed desktop storage system features two 4TB enterprise class 7200 rpm, 3.5" SATA drives, providing 8TB of raw storage capacity for your 4K videos, high-resolution RAW photos, and other important files. The convenient hardware-based RAID controls allow you to quickly configure the dual drive array for RAID 0 to maximize capacity and speeds of up to 550 MB/s. Configuring the unit for RAID 1 provides data redundancy. The Blackbox PRO RAID Array is preformatted for Mac systems, so you can get straight to using it right out of the box. Windows users must reformat the drives before use. Quickly ingest footage to the drive array using the front-facing CFast 2.0 and UHS-II SD card readers. The USB-A 3.2 Gen 2 port allows you to connect 10 Gb/s compatible storage drives directly to the system. The Blackbox PRO RAID features a comprehensive 3-year hardware warranty, which includes the cables, in addition to two years of Level 1 data recovery and one year of advanced replacement.

The USB-C 3.2 Gen 2 connection can transfer up to 10 Gb/s with compatible devices and is designed to work with Thunderbolt 3 and USB 3.0 systems using the included cables. This desktop drive system includes two enterprise class 7200 rpm, 3.5" 4TB drives with data transfer speeds of up to 550 MB/s. With hardware-based RAID 0, 1, JBOD, and SPAN support, you can configure your Blackbox PRO RAID system without having to deal with finicky software solutions. Use the convenient switches to configure the system for RAID 0 to maximize speed and usable capacity or RAID 1 for data redundancy. Streamline your workflow with the onboard CFast 2.0 and an SD card reader. The USB-A 3.2 Gen 2 port allows you to connect 10 Gb/s compatible storage devices and charge connected peripherals. The rugged aluminum shell acts as a heatsink keeping the internal hard drive at its optimal temperature to deliver higher sustained speeds. The Blackbox PRO is formatted for Mac computers and is Time Machine compatible right out of the box. You can reformat the drives for Windows.

It integrates a variety of interfaces including USB-C, USB 3.0, USB 2.0, SD card slot and TF card slot, providing a one-stop solution for extended connectivity. Designed to solve the common problem of insufficient ports on laptops and desktops, it enables seamless connectivity of multiple devices for increased productivity.
All-in-One Design: 1TB external hard drive, multi-port hub and SD/TF card reader combine to provide ample storage and comprehensive connectivity in a single device for seamless multi-device connectivity to enhance your productivity.
Multiple Interface Support: The product has a built-in 1TB hard disk and supports USB-C, USB 3.2, USB 2.0, SD card slot and TF card slot, which meets the needs of daily work. The product connects to the computer via data cable to realize multi-device interoperability.
Dual Socket Data Connection Cable: Equipped with USB 3.2 and USB-C dual socket data connection cable, suitable for more models.
Wide compatibility: Supports Windows, Mac OS, Linux, Android, iOS and other operating systems. Support Desktops, Laptops, SmartPhones, Tablets, TVs and other devices.
Portable and efficient: Integration of multiple ports, compact and lightweight design is easy to carry, solving the problem of port limitation of laptop and desktop computers; at the same time, it realizes fast, on-the-go data access and device expansion and inter-device interoperability transfer function.
Enhanced Productivity: One-stop connectivity solution reduces the need for multiple adapters, streamlines workflows, and improves overall efficiency for professionals and creative users.

Reviews.comment: Works exactly as advertised. Fast transfers on USB-C and the SD/TF slots are handy for my camera cards.
Very useful docking station + 1TB drive combo. Build feels plastic but sturdy. Would like slightly faster enclosure temps.
Good value for the price. Ports work fine, and Windows recognized the drive immediately. Card reader is a bit slow.
Decent device but had occasional disconnects when both USB 3.0 and USB-C were under load. Support responded quickly though.
Average. The docking features are convenient but transfer speeds were lower than expected on some large files.
Functionality is fine but the enclosure gets warm. Not ideal for long backups without cooling breaks.
Had compatibility issues with an older Windows 7 laptop until I installed updated drivers. Works after that but took time.
Stopped being recognized after 3 weeks. Customer support offered an RMA, but a hassle overall.
Excellent portability and features. The hub has all the ports I need for travel and the drive is reliable so far.
Nice combo device. Setup was plug-and-play with my MacBook via USB-C. SD reader is a welcome addition.
Mostly happy. Would prefer metal casing for better heat dissipation, but performance is acceptable.
Great for expanding ports on my laptop and storing backups. Lightweight and easy to carry.
